Variables.Name: NoiseFunction
Variables.Description: Noise function, affects performance and look

Variables.Name: Quality
Variables.Description: For noise functions where applicable, lower numbers are faster and lower quality, higher numbers are slower and higher quality

Variables.Name: bTiling
Variables.Description: Whether tile the noise pattern, useful for baking to seam-free repeating textures

Variables.Name: TileSize
Variables.Description:
How many units in each tile (if Tiling is on) 
	   For Perlin noise functions, Tile Size must be a multiple of three
